ingredients.item: 5 small eggplants (about 2½ lb / 1.2 kg in total)
ingredients.original: 5 small eggplants (about 2½ lb / 1.2 kg in total)

ingredients.item: 1 onion, sliced (about 1 cup / 125 g in total)
ingredients.original: 1 onion, sliced (about 1 cup / 125 g in total)

ingredients.item: 2 large tomatoes (12 oz / 350 g in total), skinned and diced
ingredients.original: 2 large tomatoes (12 oz / 350 g in total), skinned and diced

ingredients.item: 1½ cups / 350 ml chicken or vegetable stock
ingredients.original: 1½ cups / 350 ml chicken or vegetable stock
